entities.description: Group of viruses that cause mungbean yellow mosaic disease

entities.description: Whitefly species that transmits begomoviruses

entities.description: Cryptic species of B. tabaci dominant in Northern India

entities.description: Region where Asia II 1 and MYMV-Urdbean are predominant

entities.name: ASIA II 8
entities.description: Cryptic species of B. tabaci dominant in Southern India

entities.name: SOUTHERN INDIA
entities.description: Region where Asia II 8 and MYMV-Vigna are predominant

entities.name: MYMV-URDBEAN
entities.description: Strain of Mungbean yellow mosaic virus predominant in North India

entities.name: MYMV-VIGNA
entities.description: Strain of Mungbean yellow mosaic virus predominant in South India

entities.name: MYMIV
entities.description: Mungbean yellow mosaic India virus predominant in Eastern India

entities.name: EASTERN INDIA
entities.description: Region where MYMIV is predominant

entities.name: NM 94
entities.description: Mungbean line showing varying levels of tolerance to MYMD across different regions

entities.name: TOLERANCE
entities.description: Ability of a plant line to withstand the effects of a disease

entities.name: ODISHA

entities.description: Southern state of India where MYMV-Vigna is predominant

entities.description: Agricultural season in Northern India associated with high inoculum pressure

entities.description: Physical manifestations of mungbean yellow mosaic disease

entities.description: Mungbean line showing a high level of tolerance to the disease
